item.title: Oceania-Athletics-Competition
item.description: The Fiji athletics team began their campaign today at the 2026 Oceania Athletics Championships in Darwin, Australia, with several athletes competing across track and fiel
item.content:encoded: The Fiji athletics team began their campaign today at the 2026 Oceania Athletics Championships in Darwin, Australia, with several athletes competing across track and fiel

item.title: Rugby-League
item.description: James Tedesco has been named at fullback for the NSW Blues ahead of the opening game of the 2026 State of Origin series at Sydneyâ€™s Accor Stadium next week.Tedesco

item.title: Fiji-Football-Association
item.description: The Fijian Elections Office is yet to comment on the statement made today by Prime Minister, Sitive...
